heading: Program cost, fielding, and performance goals in planning major defense acquisition programs
label: 4271 Program cost, fielding, and performance goals in planning major defense acquisition programs

children.label: B
children.text: incorporate program planning that anticipates the evolution of capabilities to meet changing threats, technology insertion, and interoperability; and

children.label: A
children.text: the procurement unit cost and sustainment cost (referred to in this section as the “program cost targets”);

children.label: B
children.text: the date for initial operational capability (referred to in this section as the “fielding target”); and

children.label: C
children.text: technology maturation, prototyping, and a modular open system approach to evolve system capabilities and improve interoperability.
The term “procurement unit cost” has the meaning provided in .section 4351(a)(2) of this title
The term “initial capabilities document” has the meaning provided in .section 4251(d)(1) of this title
